summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations CMS Homepage Features. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend homepage displays dynamic content correctly with hero section, stats, services, featured products, featured blog, portfolio, and testimonials. Admin Homepage Manager with 5 tabs (Hero, Colors, Featured, Stats, Sections) working correctly. Admin Users page shows 'Access Restricted' for non-super-admin as expected. Geo-based currency detection working for IN/DE/US/GB countries.
passed_tests: Homepage content API (/api/homepage/content) returns all required fields
Hero variants structure correct with badge_text, title_line1, title_line2, subtitle, CTAs
Color schemes structure correct with 5 color options (Violet, Blue, Teal, Pink, Orange)
Stats section displays 4 stats (Projects Completed, Happy Clients, Years Experience, Team Members)
Featured blog posts returned from API (3 posts)
Featured products returned with currency conversion
Geo-based currency API returns INR for India (rate: 90.5)
Geo-based currency API returns EUR for Germany (rate: 1.0)
Geo-based currency API returns USD for USA (rate: 1.08)
Geo-based currency API returns GBP for UK
Homepage content with X-Country-Code: IN returns INR prices
Admin homepage settings API requires authentication (401)
Admin hero variants API requires authentication (401)
Admin color schemes API requires authentication (401)
Admin featured items API requires authentication (401)
Admin users API requires authentication (401)
Services API returns 6 services
Products API returns products with pricing
Portfolio API returns featured projects
Blog API returns published posts
Testimonials API returns testimonials
Homepage loads with dynamic hero section
Hero badge text displays 'AI-Powered Website Builder'
Hero CTA buttons (Start Building Free, View Our Services) clickable
4 category cards in hero (Business Website, Portfolio, E-commerce Store, Others)
Stats section visible with 'Projects Completed'
Services section displays 6 service cards
Featured Products section displays 3 products with EUR currency
Featured Blog section displays 3 blog cards
Portfolio section displays 4 featured projects
Testimonials section visible
CTA section 'Ready to Transform' visible
Admin login with email/password works
Admin navigation includes Homepage and Users links
Admin Homepage Manager page loads with 5 tabs
Hero tab shows hero variant editing form
Colors tab shows color scheme options
Featured tab accessible
Stats tab accessible
Sections tab shows visibility toggles for Services, Products, Portfolio, Testimonials, CTA
Admin Users page shows 'Access Restricted' for non-super-admin
Super admin email (jomiejoseph@gmail.com) mentioned in access restricted message
Color scheme rotation working (found Violet and Blue on different refreshes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new homepage features tested and working: 1) Dynamic homepage content API with hero variants and color schemes 2) Geo-based currency detection (EUR/INR/USD/GBP based on X-Country-Code header) 3) Admin Homepage Manager with 5 tabs for managing hero, colors, featured items, stats, and section visibility 4) Admin Users page restricted to super admin (jomiejoseph@gmail.com) 5) Color scheme rotation uses sessionStorage to persist during session. Admin login works with admin@diocreations.com / adminpassword.

features_verified.homepage_dynamic_content: Working - API returns hero variants, color schemes, featured blog/products, stats
features_verified.geo_currency_detection: Working - Returns correct currency for IN (INR), DE (EUR), US (USD), GB (GBP)
features_verified.admin_homepage_manager: Working - All 5 tabs functional (Hero, Colors, Featured, Stats, Sections)
features_verified.color_rotation: Working - Different colors shown on page refresh
